summary: Task-container-first news/geopolitical forecasting with F-G+ base-rate and prior-aware calibration
trigger_summary: Predict or forecast future developments of geopolitical events, wars, elections, policy, market-moving news

information_profile.notes: Load SEARCH_RUNTIME.md before any search step. Follow SEARCH_RUNTIME.md and shared wrapper-first routing. For generic/geopolitical search the first executable lane should normally be open-websearch, with escalation decided by runtime policy. Basic tasks require 3-5 related search rounds; major tasks require 5-10 rounds. Raw captures and digests must stay task-local.

framework_profile.notes: Use F-G+: reference class first, driver decomposition, counter-evidence pass, prior-aware recalibration, and lightweight tail discipline.

work_product_profile.notes: All intelligence, scripts, structured outputs, and reports stay inside the active task container until final delivery.
